_note: gh#14: `class:!NAME={cond}` (Tailwind v4 important-modifier prefix) round-trips as a single directive name. Pre-fix the attribute-name scanner allow-listed only `[A-Za-z0-9-_:.$|]` outside brackets; the `!` byte truncated the name to `class:`, the rest fell through to plain-attribute recovery as `font-semibold={unread}`, and tsgo flagged TS2353 against the `<span>` prop type. Post-fix the scanner mirrors upstream Svelte's terminator-set rule (`\s = / > " '`) — every other byte is part of the name, including `!`, `*`, and Tailwind's other sigils.
